description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages build and test, using a global before_script that sets GOPATH to the current directory. Add a go-build-1.4 job in the build stage using the golang:1.4 image that runs go get gitlab.com/chriseaton/malk-storage, go get github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3, git submodule update --init, and go build. Add a go-build-1.5 job in the build stage using the golang:1.5 image that runs the same go get commands, git submodule update --init, and go build. Add a go-test-1.4 job in the test stage using the golang:1.4 image that runs go get gitlab.com/chriseaton/malk-storage, go get github.com/mattn/go-sqlite3, go get github.com/stretchr/testify, and go test. Add a go-test-1.5 job in the test stage using the golang:1.5 image that runs the same test commands. Add a vet job in the build stage using the golang:1.5 image that loops over all *.go files and runs go tool vet -composites=false -unusedresult=false on each file.
